themes.label: Salvation
themes.summary: This chapter speaks of rescue, deliverance, redemption, life, or being saved. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "Although my house be not so with God; yet he hath made with me an everlasting covenant, order...". Word-study detail reinforces "יִשְׁעִ֥י: for this is all my salvation - liberty, deliverance, prosperity".
